title: Simplistico
description: A simple bright look for Minecraft
body:
# The simple look of Minecraft for 1.18.2


Simplistico is a limited color palette resourcepack by Comper

## Simplistico Supports Damage States for Tools and Weapons 
![a list of weapons and tools in different materials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e7eb5c5b7b1693f44edf3c4c9482cd769e7c22a.png)

## It features 3D Blocks
![3D Crafting Table, Hay Block, Cactus and Rails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4a82b5b31bbaf4024bd6b5cf37f98bf3b722d32.png)

## Some Inpressions: 
![A Cave with Mobs and Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5a380927f7973ea766ac5dc3226cb809daf4737.png)
